        crypto_x25519_dirty_fast
      • crypto_x25519_dirty_fast(pk: ptr uint8; sk: ptr uint8)
        crypto_x25519_dirty_small
      • crypto_x25519_dirty_small(pk: ptr uint8; sk: ptr uint8)
        crypto_x25519_inverse
      • crypto_x25519_inverse(blind_salt: ptr uint8; private_key: ptr uint8; curve_point: ptr uint8)
        crypto_x25519_public_key
      • crypto_x25519_public_key(public_key: ptr uint8; secret_key: ptr uint8)
        crypto_x25519_to_eddsa
      • crypto_x25519_to_eddsa(eddsa: ptr uint8; x25519: ptr uint8)

This module provides a low-level API for the Monocypher library which is a small and easy-to-use cryptographic library.

The API is designed to be as close as possible to the original C API, while providing some Nim-specific conveniences. The module includes functions for hashing, key derivation, key exchange, signatures, and authenticated encryption.

For a higher-level API that abstracts away some of the details, see the e2ee module.

Types

crypto_aead_ctx {.importc, bycopy.} = object
  counter*: uint64
  key*: array[32, uint8]
  nonce*: array[8, uint8]
crypto_argon2_config {.importc, bycopy.} = object
  algorithm*: uint32
  nb_blocks*: uint32
  nb_passes*: uint32
  nb_lanes*: uint32
crypto_argon2_extras {.importc, bycopy.} = object
  key*: ptr uint8
  ad*: ptr uint8
  key_size*: uint32
  ad_size*: uint32
crypto_argon2_inputs {.importc, bycopy.} = object
  pass*: ptr uint8
  salt*: ptr uint8
  pass_size*: uint32
  salt_size*: uint32
crypto_blake2b_ctx {.importc, bycopy.} = object
  hash*: array[8, uint64]
  input_offset*: array[2, uint64]
  input*: array[16, uint64]
  input_idx*: csize_t
  hash_size*: csize_t
crypto_poly1305_ctx {.importc, bycopy.} = object
  c*: array[16, uint8]
  c_idx*: csize_t
  r*: array[4, uint32]
  pad*: array[4, uint32]
  h*: array[5, uint32]
crypto_sha512_ctx {.importc, bycopy.} = object
  hash*: array[8, uint64]
  input*: array[16, uint64]
  input_size*: array[2, uint64]
  input_idx*: csize_t
crypto_sha512_hmac_ctx {.importc, bycopy.} = object
  sha*: crypto_sha512_ctx
  key*: array[128, uint8]

Vars

crypto_argon2_no_extras: crypto_argon2_extras

Consts

CRYPTO_ARGON2_D = 0
CRYPTO_ARGON2_I = 1
CRYPTO_ARGON2_ID = 2

Procs

proc crypto_aead_init_djb(ctx: ptr crypto_aead_ctx; key: ptr uint8;
                          nonce: ptr uint8) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_aead_init_ietf(ctx: ptr crypto_aead_ctx; key: ptr uint8;
                           nonce: ptr uint8) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_aead_init_x(ctx: ptr crypto_aead_ctx; key: ptr uint8;
                        nonce: ptr uint8) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_aead_lock(cipher_text: ptr uint8; mac: ptr uint8; key: ptr uint8;
                      nonce: ptr uint8; ad: ptr uint8; ad_size: csize_t;
                      plain_text: ptr uint8; text_size: csize_t) {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_aead_read(ctx: ptr crypto_aead_ctx; plain_text: ptr uint8;
                      mac: ptr uint8; ad: ptr uint8; ad_size: csize_t;
                      cipher_text: ptr uint8; text_size: csize_t): cint {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_aead_unlock(plain_text: ptr uint8; mac: ptr uint8; key: ptr uint8;
                        nonce: ptr uint8; ad: ptr uint8; ad_size: csize_t;
                        cipher_text: ptr uint8; text_size: csize_t): cint {.
    cdecl, importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_aead_write(ctx: ptr crypto_aead_ctx; cipher_text: ptr uint8;
                       mac: ptr uint8; ad: ptr uint8; ad_size: csize_t;
                       plain_text: ptr uint8; text_size: csize_t) {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_argon2(hash: ptr uint8; hash_size: uint32; work_area: pointer;
                   config: crypto_argon2_config; inputs: crypto_argon2_inputs;
                   extras: crypto_argon2_extras) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_blake2b(hash: ptr uint8; hash_size: csize_t; message: ptr uint8;
                    message_size: csize_t) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_blake2b_final(ctx: ptr crypto_blake2b_ctx; hash: ptr uint8) {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_blake2b_init(ctx: ptr crypto_blake2b_ctx; hash_size: csize_t) {.
    cdecl, importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_blake2b_keyed(hash: ptr uint8; hash_size: csize_t; key: ptr uint8;
                          key_size: csize_t; message: ptr uint8;
                          message_size: csize_t) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

                               key: ptr uint8; key_size: csize_t) {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_blake2b_update(ctx: ptr crypto_blake2b_ctx; message: ptr uint8;
                           message_size: csize_t) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_chacha20_djb(cipher_text: ptr uint8; plain_text: ptr uint8;
                         text_size: csize_t; key: ptr uint8; nonce: ptr uint8;
                         ctr: uint64): uint64 {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_chacha20_h(out: ptr uint8; key: ptr uint8; in: ptr uint8) {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_chacha20_ietf(cipher_text: ptr uint8; plain_text: ptr uint8;
                          text_size: csize_t; key: ptr uint8; nonce: ptr uint8;
                          ctr: uint32): uint32 {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_chacha20_x(cipher_text: ptr uint8; plain_text: ptr uint8;
                       text_size: csize_t; key: ptr uint8; nonce: ptr uint8;
                       ctr: uint64): uint64 {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_eddsa_check(signature: ptr uint8; public_key: ptr uint8;
                        message: ptr uint8; message_size: csize_t): cint {.
    cdecl, importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    cdecl, importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_eddsa_reduce(reduced: ptr uint8; expanded: ptr uint8) {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_eddsa_scalarbase(point: ptr uint8; scalar: ptr uint8) {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_eddsa_sign(signature: ptr uint8; secret_key: ptr uint8;
                       message: ptr uint8; message_size: csize_t) {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

                               secret_key: array[32, uint8];
                               seed: array[32, uint8]) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    cdecl, importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

                          tweak: uint8): cint {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

                     message_size: csize_t; key: array[32, uint8]) {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    cdecl, importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    cdecl, importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_sha512(hash: ptr uint8; message: ptr uint8; message_size: csize_t) {.
    cdecl, importc, header: "monocypher-ed25519.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc crypto_sha512_final(ctx: ptr crypto_sha512_ctx; hash: ptr uint8) {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher-ed25519.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc crypto_sha512_hkdf(okm: ptr uint8; okm_size: csize_t; ikm: ptr uint8;
                        ikm_size: csize_t; salt: ptr uint8; salt_size: csize_t;
                        info: ptr uint8; info_size: csize_t) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher-ed25519.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

                               prk: ptr uint8; prk_size: csize_t;
                               info: ptr uint8; info_size: csize_t) {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher-ed25519.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

                        message: ptr uint8; message_size: csize_t) {.cdecl,
    importc, header: "monocypher-ed25519.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    cdecl, importc, header: "monocypher-ed25519.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

                             key_size: csize_t) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher-ed25519.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

                               message: ptr uint8; message_size: csize_t) {.
    cdecl, importc, header: "monocypher-ed25519.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],

    header: "monocypher-ed25519.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

                          message_size: csize_t) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher-ed25519.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

                   their_public_key: ptr uint8) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

                           curve_point: ptr uint8) {.cdecl, importc,
    header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    cdecl, importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    importc, header: "monocypher.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Made with Nim. Generated: 2026-04-01 22:05:58 UTC
